name: Chipshot Bar & Restaurant
about: Chipshot is an indoor sports venue featuring 8 climate-controlled pickleball courts and 4 high-tech golf simulator bays. The facility integrates gameplay with a full-service sports bar and kitchen, offering a comprehensive recreational experience. Targeting both casual players and serious enthusiasts, the venue provides a space for practice, competition, and social gatherings. Memberships are available with benefits including priority booking, discounted food and drinks, and access to special events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman simulators provide realistic and immersive gameplay
Access to the facility year-round, unaffected by weather conditions
Convenient booking system and early simulator booking privileges for members
On-site sports bar with a full kitchen and self-pour beer wall for post-game relaxation

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with a menu including burgers, wings, shareable platters, and other items designed to fuel players and fans.
Taproom features 16 taps, including 12 craft beers with a focus on local String's Beer, as well as a selection of wines and cocktails. BYOB is not mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-tech Trackman golf simulators providing a realistic and immersive experience.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice to bring your own clubs for the golf simulators. The venue may offer club rentals but this information is not provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and taproom, so bringing outside food and drink is likely not permitted. On-site food and drinks are available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but typical simulator rounds for 18 holes generally take between 60-90 minutes depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chipshot is kid-friendly. They offer family memberships and describe the facility as an 'adult playground' and a 'fun, social environment' that can be enjoyed by all ages and skill levels.
